articles.title: Amazon opens up its global logistics network to all businesses
articles.description: The new service, called Amazon Supply Chain Services, pits the e-commerce giant directly against UPS and FedEx.

articles.title: Bitcoin in ‘disbelief rally’ as traders spot $84K BTC price target
articles.description: Bitcoin’s rally on Monday pushed it above $80,000 for the first time since January as analysts say BTC price could rise further to fill the futures gap at $84,000 in the short term.

articles.title: Binance is launching a withdrawal lock to help deter crypto wrench attacks
articles.description: The lock is meant to protect users from being forced into withdrawing their funds, though it's an internal policy and not a cryptographic lock.

articles.title: SEC delays prediction market ETFs over mechanics and risk concerns: Report
articles.description: The regulator reportedly requested more information from Roundhill, GraniteShares and Bitwise about how the event contract funds would work.

articles.title: Trump-affiliated World Liberty sues Justin Sun for 'defamation' after Tron creator's lawsuit
articles.description: World Liberty alleged that Sun engaged in short-selling, straw purchases and defamation.

articles.title: Bitcoin price eyes $96K as institutions absorb 500% of daily BTC supply
articles.description: In past instances, BTC has averaged 24% gains in one month when institutional demand absorbed over 500% of the daily mined supply.

articles.title: Doordash adds AI tools to speed up merchant onboarding, edit photos of dishes
articles.description: DoorDash on Monday added new AI-powered tools that let merchants speed up onboarding, edit photos to make dishes look better, and create new websites from existing content.

articles.title: South Korea crypto sector warns AML proposal goes too far: Report
articles.description: Crypto industry body DAXA said the proposed rules could push suspicious transaction reports from South Korea’s five largest exchanges to more than 5.4 million a year, Yonhap reported.

articles.title: Iran missile report sends bitcoin back to $79,000, with ETH, SOL, DOGE sharply lower
articles.description: The largest crypto reversed sharply from a $80,594 high after Iran's Fars news agency claimed two missiles hit a U.S. warship, with oil spiking 5% before the U.S. denied the report.
